title: Edwardia digitata
taxonomy: Edwardia digitata is a species of plant in the family Melastomataceae. It is native to South America, specifically in Brazil. The classification of Edwardia digitata places it in the kingdom Plantae, and further into the class Magnoliopsida. Within the class Magnoliopsida, it belongs to the order Myrtales. At the family level, the Melastomataceae family is a part of the eudicotyledons, which are flowering plants.
